title: Investments in 2016
input_format: Table: Insurance with columns pid (int), tiv_2015 (float), tiv_2016 (float), lat (float), lon (float)
output_format: Result table with column tiv_2016 showing the sum of tiv_2016 for qualifying policyholders, rounded to 2 decimal places
constraints:
- pid is the primary key
- Each row contains policyholder info
- lat and lon represent city location
